rationale: Clean, scoped implementation: a single new Svelte panel + GraphQL module + one server route + Playwright spec, mounted on the existing project home. All six AC threads (gating, preview, approve, live recent pane, click-through, e2e + XSS) are covered with matching `data-testid` hooks and real-server e2e. Body/title rely on Svelte's default text interpolation (no `{@html}`), and the XSS test guards regression.
